name: munack-workspace
description: Munack monorepo - reality check for AI-generated code.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @balkanbrs/munack-core && npm run build -w munack-cli && npm run build -w munack
scripts.test: npm run test -w @balkanbrs/munack-core && npm run test -w munack
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
